raw_consumer_statement:
I am disputing a {$5000.00} charge on my Citibank credit card ( last four digits : XXXX  ) from a company called XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. 
I canceled the service in writing before it began and requested a refund on XX/XX/year>. I never accessed any platform or services. 

Citibank accepted my dispute under Case ID XXXX, but no reversal was issued. I was told it wou

ld resolve in 7 business days. Its been longer, and Im now being pressured to pay a charge for services never rendered. I have supporting documentation including email cancellation, merchant refusal, contract terms, and screenshots. I believe this delay violates my rights under the Fair Credit Billing Act and am requesting immediate CFPB intervention.
